findings.issue: Decision 7 ("Single-threaded, no --jobs, no pre-seeding") has Decision + Rationale but no "Alternatives considered" line, unlike Decisions 1-6.
findings.fix: Add an "Alternatives considered:" line to Decision 7 (e.g. multi-connection load spread across backends — rejected because OOM must hit a single backend), or note that no viable alternative exists.

findings.issue: Task 3 "Files to read" lists `001-feat-backend-killer.md` as a bare filename without the docs/features path prefix, while other paths are repo-relative.
findings.fix: Use the full path `docs/features/001-feat-backend-killer/001-feat-backend-killer.md` for consistency and unambiguous resolution by the executor.

summary: Tech-spec passes template compliance with zero critical/major findings. All required sections present and non-empty (Solution, Architecture with both subsections, 7 Decisions, Data Models, Dependencies with both subsections, Testing Strategy size=M, Agent Verification Plan with all 3 subsections, Risks table, Acceptance Criteria, Implementation Tasks by waves, plus Backward Compatibility). Frontmatter valid (created/status=draft/branch/size=M). File paths and one-word package naming match architecture.md and patterns.md. Risks are realistic with mitigations in table form. Verification steps are concrete bash commands; verify: present on observable tasks. 4 tasks (<=15), all skills (code-writing/documentation-writing/pre-deploy-qa) and reviewers (dev-code-reviewer/dev-security-auditor/dev-test-reviewer — all exist) match the catalog. Final Wave with Pre-deploy QA present. Task descriptions are brief scope (no AC/TDD anchors/line-number refs/how-to). Technical decisions live in the Decisions section, not embedded in task descriptions. No time-based estimates. No wave file-conflicts: Wave 1 touches only backendkiller/*, Wave 2 Task 2 touches cmd/*, Task 3 touches README.md — no intersections; wave dependencies are logical (CLI wiring after package; QA last). Two minor cosmetic findings only.
